testcase.name: CausalMaskNoDropout

failure.message: unknown file C++ exception with description "Flash Attention is not available. Please compile with USE_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 Exception raised from _flash_attention_forward at /data/users/serhatgundem/pytorch_fork/torch/standalone/cuda/flash_attn_template.h:240 (most recent call first): frame #0: c10::Error::Error(c10::SourceLocation, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >) + 0x88 (0x7fbacc196b88 in /data/users/serhatgundem/pytorch_fork/build/lib/libc10.so) frame #1: c10::detail::torchCheckFail(char const*, char const*, unsigned int, char const*) + 0x59 (0x7fbacc134fd5 in /data/users/serhatgundem/pytorch_fork/build/lib/libc10.so) frame #2: ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone() [0x4345fe] frame #3: ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone() [0x43466b] frame #4: ScaledDotProductFlashAttentionTest_CausalMaskNoDropout_Test::TestBody() + 0x1ab (0x43483b in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #5: void testing::internal::HandleExceptionsInMethodIfSupported<testing::Test, void>(testing::Test*, void (testing::Test::*)(), char const*) + 0x3d (0x4ac54d in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #6: ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone() [0x49865e] frame #7: testing::TestInfo::Run() + 0x555 (0x498df5 in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #8: ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone() [0x499c4b] frame #9: testing::internal::UnitTestImpl::RunAllTests() + 0x1141 (0x4a1d81 in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #10: testing::UnitTest::Run() + 0x78 (0x499288 in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #11: main + 0xc4 (0x42ef34 in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) frame #12: <unknown function> + 0x295d0 (0x7fbaba4295d0 in /lib64/libc.so.6) frame #13: __libc_start_main + 0x80 (0x7fbaba429680 in /lib64/libc.so.6) frame #14: _start + 0x25 (0x432e75 in ./build/bin/test_aoti_standalone) " thrown in the test body.
